ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the stock exchange */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the stock exchange was founded */,
  "operating_hours_start" TEXT /* Start time of the stock exchange's operating hours */,
  "operating_hours_end" TEXT /* End time of the stock exchange's operating hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol or ticker */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date the company went public */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchange ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the trading day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the trading day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount of money traded */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price of the stock */,
  "after_hours_price" REAL /* After-hours price of the stock */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in stock price from the previous day */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in stock price from the previous day */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Status of the user account (active or inactive) */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date and time the user last changed their password */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the portfolio was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the portfolio was last updated */,
  "initial_investment" REAL /* Initial amount invested in the portfolio */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the portfolio */,
  "risk_tolerance" TEXT /* Risk tolerance level of the portfolio (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "investment_horizon" INTEGER /* Investment horizon in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock held */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was purchased */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current price of the stock in the holding */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the holding */,
  "gain_loss" REAL /* Gain or loss on the holding */,
  "gain_loss_percentage" REAL /* Percentage gain or loss on the holding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the technical indicator (e.g., Moving Average, RSI) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the technical indicator */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the indicator was calculated */,
  "time_period" INTEGER /* Time period over which the indicator was calculated */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of technical indicator (e.g., trend, momentum, volatility) */,
  "indicator_source" TEXT /* Source of the technical indicator (e.g., internal, external API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the performance was calculated */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the portfolio */,
  "return_percentage" REAL /* Return percentage of the portfolio */,
  "benchmark_value" REAL /* Value of the benchmark index */,
  "drawdown" REAL /* Maximum drawdown of the portfolio */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the portfolio */,
  "sortino_ratio" REAL /* Sortino ratio of the portfolio */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_performance_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., theme, notification frequency) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "theme_color" TEXT /* Preferred color theme (e.g., light, dark, custom) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language (e.g., English, Spanish, Chinese) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from where the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
